zh.lifeSummary: 當Borante Podebusk von Putbus I於1187年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根普特布斯時，他的父親Stoislaw von Rügen I47歲，母親Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark40歲。他於1214年與Woizlava von Putbus在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_包莫盧根普特布斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1237年享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Putbus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from an Arabic-influenced (see Boutros ) form of the personal name Pāṭrōs ‘Peter’ (see Patros ).

variants.name: Boutros
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Samir, Ayman, Amal, Ashraf, Fadi, Fouad, Kamel, Mounir, Nabil, Ramzi, Saad, Sameh.  French Antoine, Camille, Laure, Monique, Odette, Pierre.
Arabic (Egypt, Lebanon, and Syria): from the Arabic personal name Butros, Greek Petros (see Peter ), found among Christians.

nameMeanings.name: Borante
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Angel, Carlos, Francisco, Juan, Manuel, Alberto, Alfredo, Andres, Arturo, Enrrique, Felipe.  Italian Giovanni, Paolo.
Spanish and Italian: from a personal name, probably a variant of   Morando  .

variants.name: Morando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Sal.  Spanish Jesus, Augusto, Eusebio, Javier, Jose Manuel, Luz Maria, Mariano, Marta, Ramon, Raul, Roberto, Vicente.
Italian and Spanish: from the medieval personal name Morando, from medieval Latin Morandus (see Morand ).

en.lifeSummary: When Borante Podebusk von Putbus I was born in 1187, in Putbus, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Stoislaw von Rügen I, was 47 and his mother, Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark, was 40. He married Woizlava von Putbus in 1214, in Putbus, Rügen, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1237, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Borante Podebusk von Putbus I est né en 1187, à Putbus, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Stoislaw von Rügen I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Woizlava von Putbus en 1214, à Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1237, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Borante Podebusk von Putbus I 1187 in Putbus, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stoislaw von Rügen I 47 und seine Mutter Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark 40. Er hat 1214 in Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland Woizlava von Putbus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Borante Podebusk von Putbus I è nato il nel 1187 nel Putbus, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Stoislaw von Rügen I, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Woizlava von Putbus nel 1214, nel Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1237, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Borante Podebusk von Putbus Iが1187年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンルuジェンプウトブスで生まれた時，父Stoislaw von Rügen Iは47歳，母Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmarkは40歳であった。1214年にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンポンメルンルuジェンプウトブスでWoizlava von Putbusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1237年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Borante Podebusk von Putbus I(이)가 1187년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 u겐 풋버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stoislaw von Rügen I(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1214년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 폼머 u겐 풋버스에서 Woizlava von Putbus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Borante Podebusk von Putbus I nasceu em 1187, em Putbus, Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Stoislaw von Rügen I, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Woizlava von Putbus em 1214, em Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1237, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Borante Podebusk von Putbus I родился в 1187 г. в местности путбус, рuджен, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Stoislaw von Rügen I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmingard Knudsdatter af Danmark, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Woizlava von Putbus в 1214 г. в местности путбус, рuджен, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1237 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Woizlava von Putbus en 1214, en Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1237, a la edad de 50 años.
